This is a rare opportunity to acquire an exclusive, off-market 6-unit multi-family property in the heart of Queens Village — one of Queens' most in-demand investment corridors. Built in 2006 and meticulously maintained, this income-producing asset offers immediate cash flow with significant upside potential.

The property features a generous 60x107 lot, full basement, solar panels, and a deck — delivering both modern efficiency and everyday comfort for tenants. With flexible mother-daughter layout options and 8 total bedrooms across 6 units, this is the kind of generational wealth asset that rarely becomes available off-market.
